response: Define the study objectives to ensure data collection aligns with data analysis goals. Collect data from diverse sources to enhance data reliability and validity. Use standardized tools to ensure data consistency and data accuracy. Monitor data entry processes to prevent data errors and data loss. Analyze data patterns to identify data trends and data correlations. Validate data sources to confirm data authenticity and data integrity. Interpret data findings to derive data insights and data implications. Present data results to support data-driven decisions and data transparency.
